Package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire

Class RBuf

java.lang.Object
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.RBuf
public final class RBuf extends Object
Read-side byte buffer with a cursor. Mirror of WBuf.

All primitives throw EOFException-typed IllegalArgumentException (kept unchecked to make codec code readable) if the buffer is too short.

Not thread-safe.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RBuf(byte[] data)

    RBuf(byte[] data, int offset, int length)
    Wrap the [offset, offset+length) slice of data.

      public long varInt()
      Read an unsigned LEB128 varint. See VarInt.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - on truncated or malformed encoding

    • bytes

      public byte[] bytes(int n)
      Read n raw bytes into a fresh array.

    • lenString

      Length-prefixed UTF-8 string.

    • slice

      public RBuf slice(int n)
      Consume up to n bytes and return a new RBuf viewing that slice. The parent cursor advances by n.
